heading: Authorization for payment of United States contribution to increase Fund for Special Operations; authorization of appropriations
label: 283p Authorization for payment of United States contribution to increase Fund for Special Operations; authorization of appropriations

children.label: a
children.text: The United States Governor of the Bank is authorized to pay to the Fund for Special Operations two annual installments of $450,000,000 each in accordance with and subject to the terms and conditions of the resolution adopted by the Board of Governors on , concerning an increase in the resources of the Fund for Special Operations and contributions thereto.December 31, 1970

children.label: b
children.text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, the amounts necessary for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury of the two annual installments of $450,000,000 each for the United States share of the increase in the resources of the Fund for Special Operations of the Bank.
